catalog_items.raw_name: Kathuria 'High Speed Tail Braker Pinch Roll'
catalog_items.clean_name: Kathuria 'High Speed Tail Braker Pinch Roll'
catalog_items.description: The Kathuria 'High Speed Tail Braker Pinch Roll' is engineered for an impressive speed of 35 meters per second. It features a compact and rigid design with a shock-absorbing arrangement to counter vibrations, ensuring durability and ease of use. Key features also include ease in maintenance, axial adjustment for roll assembly alignment, and a highly engineered bearing arrangement.
catalog_items.seo_title: Kathuria 'High Speed Tail Braker Pinch Roll'
catalog_items.alt_text: Kathuria 'High Speed Tail Braker Pinch Roll'

specifications.Roll Assembly Alignment: Axial adjustment arrangement to hold & keep the Roll Assembly aligned & stable

social_source.caption:
Introducing Kathuria 'High Speed Tail Braker Pinch Roll'

Engineered to achieve an impressive speed of 35 meters per second, this Pinch Roll boasts a compact and rigid design, complete with a shock-absorbing arrangement to effectively counter vibrations. 

Discover the perfect blend of speed, durability, and ease of use with Kathuria's latest innovation.

#Kathuria #SteelMills #PinchRoll #Engineering #Innovation #HighPerformance

posts.caption:
At #Kathuria Rollmill (kathuriarollmill.com), we are working everyday to offer progressive - forward thinking - solutions in the #Steel Rolling Mill domain. 100+ clients across the globe trust our unwavering commitment to #quality. Become a part of the Kathuria family today! 
.
.
.
If you have a question - please feel free to drop a comment. Or if you would like to get in touch with us, please contact us at info@kathuriarollmill.com or +91 120 4179800/+91 7428982666.

#Kathuria #rollingmill #TMTrebars #wirerod #merchantmills #steelindustry #hotrolling #MakeinIndia #steelmanufacturing

#Kathuria Rollmill is pleased to announce the successful and swift #commissioning of 300,000 TPA #TMT bar mill at Rungta Mines Ltd., Chaliyama Steel Plant II. 
.
.
.
If you have a question - please feel free to drop a comment. Or if you would like to get in touch with us, please contact us at info@kathuriarollmill.com or +91 120 4179800/+91 7428982666.

Introducing Kathuria 'High Speed Tail Braker Pinch Roll'

Engineered to achieve an impressive speed of 35 meters per second, this Pinch Roll boasts a compact and rigid design, complete with a shock-absorbing arrangement to effectively counter vibrations. 

Discover the perfect blend of speed, durability, and ease of use with Kathuria's latest innovation.

Successful Installation and Running of 'kathuria' Pre-Stressed Mill Stands along with auxiliaries at one of our customer's site in India

Kathuria proudly participated as a Sponsor at AIIFA 2025, reaffirming its long-standing commitment to the growth and advancement of India’s steel industry. The event brought together key stakeholders, industry leaders, and technology providers to exchange insights on innovation, sustainability, and the future of steel manufacturing.

Through its presence at AIIFA 2025, Kathuria showcased its engineering capabilities and comprehensive solutions for the steel rolling mill sector—backed by decades of experience in design, manufacturing, project execution, and after-sales support.

Our participation as a sponsor reflects Kathuria’s continued dedication to supporting industry platforms that drive collaboration, knowledge sharing, and technological progress within the steel ecosystem.

Experience the execution of a Kathuria engineering project through this detailed time-lapse video. From groundwork and structural assembly to precision installation, this project reflects Kathuria’s expertise in delivering reliable, high-performance solutions for the steel rolling mill industry.

With decades of experience in engineering, manufacturing, and project execution, Kathuria specializes in complete solutions for hot steel rolling mills—covering design, equipment supply, installation, and after-sales support. This time-lapse highlights the discipline, planning, and technical excellence that go into every Kathuria project.

If you are planning a new steel rolling mill or upgrading an existing setup, Kathuria offers proven engineering solutions built for performance, durability, and long-term value.

Visit us at https://www.kathuriarollmill.com/

Kathuria successfully delivers and commissions its latest Housingless Mill Stand project in West Bengal (India), reinforcing its leadership in hot steel rolling mill solutions. Designed for high performance, precision, and long service life, Kathuria’s housingless stands ensure superior mill stability, productivity, and consistent output.

With over four decades of expertise, Kathuria continues to support the steel industry with reliable engineering, robust manufacturing, and strong after-sales service.
